headline: NVIDIA’s In Orbit AI Milestone Extends Reach Across Key Infrastructure Markets
summary: Planet Labs completed real-time AI object detection onboard its Pelican-4 satellite using NVIDIA Jetson Orin modules, marking a first for in-orbit AI inference. NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) is also supplying hardware and platforms for partners in telecommunications and industry clouds that are building AI capable networks and data...

headline: 5 Money Mistakes Many Americans Make That Are Quietly Stealing Their Financial Future
summary: Carrying a credit card balance feels harmless until you do the math. At a 25% APR, the average American cardholder with an unpaid balance of $7,886 is quietly paying nearly $2,000 a year in pure interest, money that buys nothing, builds nothing, and compounds against them every month.
